Part.Source:
Event Start
btnGravarMesmoComErro.Visible = 0 loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FrtPedFiLCod = &Context.FilCod
txtTipoFrete.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) TxtTransportadora.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) &AdicionarNotaPedido = 'N' do 'LoadFrete' do 'AtivaInativaAba'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
TableContent.Height = 450 &NFFilCodNOm.TooltipText = "Filial informada ao Lançamento do Frete." &PedCod.TooltipText = "Sequência do pedido" &FrtPedFiLCod.TooltipText = "Filial informada ao Lançamento do Frete." &FrtItmTip.TooltipText = "A NF do frete foi emitida pela empresa ou por terceiros." &FrtItmNot.TooltipText = "O Frete é Referente à Mercadorias que ENTRARAM ou SAÍRAM do seu Estoque."
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoGravarMesmoComErro'
do 'Gravar' btnGravarMesmoComErro.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCorrigirTransportadora'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadora.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadora.Close
If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadora.Result = !'Yes' SubstituiTransportadoraRedespacho.Call('R', &EmpCod, &OutFilCod, &OutPedCod, &FrtTraCod, &Context.UserName) do 'verificaPedidoNota' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadora.Result = !'Yes'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCorrigirTransportadoraSaida'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadoraSaida.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadoraSaida.Close
If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadoraSaida.Result = !'Yes' SubstituiTransportadoraRedespacho.Call('S', &EmpCod, &OutFilCod, &OutPedCod, &FrtTraCod, &Context.UserName) do 'verificaPedidoNota' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTransportadoraSaida.Result = !'Yes'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCorrigirTipoFrete'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTipoFrete.Confirm()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTipoFrete.Close
If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTipoFrete.Result = !'Yes' SubstituiTipoFreteNotaPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &FrtItmTip) do 'verificaPedidoNota' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Ask If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_BtnCorrigirTipoFrete.Result = !'Yes'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
&PedObsFrt.Enabled = 0 &PedCotFrtVlr.Enabled = 0 &TransportadoraCotacao.Enabled = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
tbCte.Visible = (1=2) If not(not &PedObsFrt.IsEmpty() or &PedCotFrtVlr > 0 or not &TransportadoraCotacao.IsEmpty() or not &CotNro.isempty()) DVPanel_Comunic_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_Comunic_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf If not(not &Status.IsEmpty()) DVPanel_tbMensagem_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_tbMensagem_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf If not(&IsErroTipFrt = true) DVPanel_tbTipoFreteNF_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_tbTipoFreteNF_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf If not(&IsErroTraCod = true) DVPanel_tbTransportadora_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_tbTransportadora_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Refresh
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &PedCod.IsValid
if &PedCod > 0 do 'verificaPedidoNota' &FrtItmCte.setFocus() Endif
EndEvent
Event &NfeNum.IsValid
if &NfeNum > 0 do 'verificaPedidoNota'
&FrtItmCte.setFocus() EndIf
EndEvent
Event &NfeCod.IsValid
if &NfeCod > 0 &AuxNfeCod = &NfeCod &OldNfeCod = &NfeCod Endif
do 'verificaPedidoNota'
&FrtItmCte.setFocus() // Endif
EndEvent
Event &AdicionarNotaPedido.IsValid
do 'AtivaInativaAba'
EndEvent
Event Enter
do 'verificaPedidoNota' If &IsErro = false and &IsErroTipFrt = false and &IsErroTraCod = false do 'Gravar' EndIF
EndEvent
Event &FrtItmNot.IsValid
If &OldFrtItmNot <> &FrtItmNot if &FrtItmNot = 'E' &FrtItmTip = 'D' Else &FrtItmTip = 'E' EndiF EndiF &OldFrtItmNot = &FrtItmNot
if not &NfeNum.IsEmpty() or not &PedCod.IsEmpty() do 'verificaPedidoNota' EndIf
EndEvent
Sub 'gravar'
If &AdicionarNotaPedido = 'N' //NOTA FISCAL &FrtItmCod = 0 &FrtNfeFilCod = &FilCod &FrtNfeCod = &NfeCod &FrtNfeNum = &NfeNum &FrtPedFiLCod = 0 &FrtPedCod = 0 Else &FrtItmCod = 0 &FrtNfeFilCod = &FilCod &FrtNfeCod = 0 &FrtNfeNum = 0 if &OutFilCod > 0 &FrtPedFiLCod = &OutFilCod Else &FrtPedFiLCod = &FilCod Endif &FrtPedCod = &PedCod EndIF
if &FrtItmCte.IsEmpty() &FrtItmCte = &FrtDoc EndiF
&OoFrtItmNot.FromString(&FrtItmNot) GravaConhecimentoPedido.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&FrtCod,&AdicionarNotaPedido,&FrtNfeFilCod,&FrtNfeCod,&FrtNfeNum, &FrtPedFiLCod,&FrtPedCod, &FrtItmVlr, &OoFrtItmNot, &FrtItmTip, &FrtItmCte, &Context.UserName)
&PedCod.SetEmpty() &PedCliCodRaz.SetEmpty() &NfeNum.SetEmpty() &OutNfeCod.SetEmpty() &FrtItmVlr.SetEmpty()
if &AdicionarNotaPedido = 'N' msg('Nota Fiscal adicionada com sucesso!') &NfeNum.SetFocus() Else msg('Pedido adicionado com sucesso!') &PedCod.SetFocus() EndiF
EndSub
Sub 'verificaPedidoNota'
btnGravarMesmoComErro.Visible = 0 &OoFrtItmNot.FromString(&FrtItmNot) &FrtItmCte = &FrtItmCte.Trim()
If &AdicionarNotaPedido = 'N' //ADICIONAR NOTA'
Do 'montacombo' localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call(&AdicionarNotaPedido, &OoFrtItmNot, &EmpCod, &FrtPedFiLCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &AuxNfeCod, &NfeNum, &FrtTraCod, &FrtItmCte, &FrtItmTip, &FrtDtaLct, &NfeCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &OutPedCod, &OutFilCod, &OutNfeCod, &PedObsFrt, &PedCotFrtVlr, &TransportadoraCotacao, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado)
Else //If &AdicionarNotaPedido = 'P' //ADICIONAR PEDIDO' localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call(&AdicionarNotaPedido, &OoFrtItmNot, &EmpCod, &FrtPedFiLCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &NfeCod, &NfeNum, &FrtTraCod, &FrtItmCte, &FrtItmTip, &FrtDtaLct, &PedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &OutPedCod, &OutFilCod, &OutNfeCod, &PedObsFrt, &PedCotFrtVlr, &TransportadoraCotacao, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) EndIF
if &IsErroJaLancado = true btnGravarMesmoComErro.Visible = 1 Endif
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndSub
Sub 'montacombo'
&NfeCod.Clear()
&NfeCod = 0 &AuxNfeCod = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeNum = &NfeNum Where NfeEntSai = &OoFrtItmNot &Mensagem = 'SQ: ' + trim(str(NfeCod)) + ' - CL: ' + trim(NfeCliRaz) &NfeCod.AddItem(NfeCod, &Mensagem)
// if &NfeCod.IsEmpty() // &NfeCod = NfeCod // Endif // if &OldNfeCod = NfeCod &NfeCod = &OldNfeCod Endif
if &AuxNfeCod.IsEmpty() &AuxNfeCod = NfeCod Endif When none &AuxNfeCod = 0 &OldNfeCod = 0 EndFor
if &NfeCod > 0 &AuxNfeCod = &NfeCod Else &NfeCod = &AuxNfeCod Endif
&OldNfeCod = &NfeCod
EndSub
Sub 'LoadFrete'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod
// &FilCodNOm = FilCodNom &NFFilCodNOm = FilCodNom &FrtDtaLct = FrtDtaLct &FrtTraCod = FrtTraCod &PedTraRedCodRaz = FrtTraCodRaz &FrtDoc = FrtDoc
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'AtivaInativaAba'
If &AdicionarNotaPedido = 'N' //ADICIONAR NOTA gxUITabsPanel_AbaFrete.HideTab(1) gxUITabsPanel_AbaFrete.ShowTab(2) gxUITabsPanel_AbaFrete.SelectTab(2) &NfeNum.SetFocus() Else gxUITabsPanel_AbaFrete.HideTab(2) gxUITabsPanel_AbaFrete.ShowTab(1) gxUITabsPanel_AbaFrete.SelectTab(1) &PedCod.SetFocus() EndIF
EndSub
